item.title: Metal Spray Repair for a CAT Crank Pulley
item.description: A worn CAT crank pulley is restored using a metal spray process that rebuilds damaged surfaces without full replacement. Can this repair save a costly component?

media:content.media:title: Metal Spray Repair for a CAT Crank Pulley
media:content.media:description: A worn CAT crank pulley is restored using a metal spray process that rebuilds damaged surfaces without full replacement. Can this repair save a costly component?

item.title: Liquid Nitrogen Repair Process on Heavy Machinery
item.description: Liquid nitrogen is used during a heavy machinery repair to assist with fitting, removal, or restoration work. How does extreme cold make the job easier?

media:content.media:title: Liquid Nitrogen Repair Process on Heavy Machinery
media:content.media:description: Liquid nitrogen is used during a heavy machinery repair to assist with fitting, removal, or restoration work. How does extreme cold make the job easier?

item.title: Cylinder Tear-Down and Spanner Making
item.description: A hydraulic cylinder is dismantled while a custom spanner tool is fabricated to make the job possible. Why are custom tools sometimes the best solution?

media:content.media:title: Cylinder Tear-Down and Spanner Making
media:content.media:description: A hydraulic cylinder is dismantled while a custom spanner tool is fabricated to make the job possible. Why are custom tools sometimes the best solution?

item.title: Replacing a Cracked Equalizer Bar End
item.description: A cracked equalizer bar end is replaced to restore structural integrity and reliable operation in heavy machinery. What stresses caused the damage?

media:content.media:description: A cracked equalizer bar end is replaced to restore structural integrity and reliable operation in heavy machinery. What stresses caused the damage?

item.title: Franna Crane Run with 6BT Power
item.description: The Franna crane takes a major step forward as it runs with a 6BT engine, showcasing the results of extensive work and upgrades. How does the new powerplant perform?

media:content.media:description: The Franna crane takes a major step forward as it runs with a 6BT engine, showcasing the results of extensive work and upgrades. How does the new powerplant perform?

item.title: Heavy-Duty Parts Washer in Action
item.description: A newly completed heavy-duty parts washer is put to use, tackling dirty components and proving its effectiveness in the workshop. How well does it perform under real conditions?

item.title: Machining Chain Clamp Components with Precision
item.description: Chain clamp components are machined to tight tolerances, ensuring durability and reliable performance in demanding workshop applications. Why is precision so important here?

item.title: CAT D11 Dozer Ripper Shank Repair
item.description: A worn or damaged D11 ripper shank is repaired and reinforced to withstand the harsh demands of heavy earthmoving work. Can it be restored to full strength?

item.description: A CAT 637 scraper cylinder is completely rebuilt to restore hydraulic performance and reliability. What goes into rebuilding equipment of this size?

item.title: Custom Chain Clamp Vices for Faster Setup
item.description: Purpose-built chain clamp vices are designed to reduce setup time and improve efficiency when machining large or irregular parts. How much time can the right tooling save?

item.title: Restoring a Big Excavator Arm and Bucket
item.description: A heavily worn excavator arm and bucket undergo repair and rebuilding to return them to working condition. How much life can be restored to these hard-worked components?

item.title: Building a Boom End and Fall Block
item.description: A boom end and fall block are fabricated and assembled for heavy lifting applications, requiring strength, accuracy, and careful machining. What challenges come with building components that handle massive loads?

item.title: Replacing a Broken Eye on a CAT 756

item.title: Machining a 1045 Hollow Bar for Tailstock Chuck
item.description: Machining a large 1045 hollow bar for the Megabore tailstock chuck, with the first stage of the build underway. A precise start to a heavy engineering project—what comes next?
